content.query:
IF OBJECT_ID('dbo.Patient', 'U') IS NOT NULL
    DROP TABLE dbo.Patient;
GO

CREATE TABLE dbo.Patient
(
    PatientID   INT         NOT NULL,
    FirstName   VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
    LastName    VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
    DateOfBirth DATE        NOT NULL,
    Gender      VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT PK_Patient PRIMARY KEY NONCLUSTERED (PatientID) NOT ENFORCED
);
GO

INSERT INTO dbo.Patient (PatientID, FirstName, LastName, DateOfBirth, Gender)
VALUES (1, 'John', 'Smith', '1985-03-15', 'Male');
GO

INSERT INTO dbo.Patient (PatientID, FirstName, LastName, DateOfBirth, Gender)
VALUES (2, 'Emma', 'Johnson', '1992-07-22', 'Female');
GO

VALUES (3, 'Liam', 'Brown', '1978-11-08', 'Male');
GO

VALUES (4, 'Olivia', 'Davis', '2001-01-19', 'Female');
GO

VALUES (5, 'Noah', 'Wilson', '1990-09-30', 'Male');
GO

VALUES (6, 'Ava', 'Taylor', '1988-05-14', 'Female');
GO

SELECT * 
FROM dbo.Patient;
GO
